# Resource: test_forbidden

Fixture for FrontmatterRule tests — deliberately includes layout and
sidebar_current so forbid_layout / forbid_sidebar_current have something
to fire on.

## Argument Reference

* `name` - (Required) Name of the instance.

## Attribute Reference

This resource exports no additional attributes.
